---
title: "identifiers_and_assignment"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=.@"]
---

# identifiers_and_assignment

## variables name

### ASCII names

```{julia}
a = 1
```

### Unicode names

```{julia}
我是一个天才 = 1
```

### LaTeX-style input

```{julia}
α = 1 # \alpha + Tab 当然lazyvim 是在列表里面找
```

### all-underscore identifiers

```{julia}
x, ___ = size([2 2; 1 1]); # ___ is a variable write-only
println(x)
```
